title: gymnanthemum wightianum
intro: Gymnanthemum wightianum, also known as the Siam tea or Thai tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, due to the presence of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum wightianum include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is a popular remedy in traditional medicine, particularly in Thailand.
